[@microsoft/fast-element/directives/when.js](../fast-element/index.html) &gt; [ExecutionContext](../fast-element.executioncontext/index.html) &gt; [isInMiddle](../fast-element.executioncontext.isinmiddle/index.html)

## ExecutionContext.isInMiddle property

Indicates whether the current item within a repeat context is somewhere in the middle of the collection.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly isInMiddle: boolean;
```
